title: Pack of 100 White Plastic Bowls – 12 OZ, Washable & Reusable –Microwaveable- Perfect for Parties, Dessert, and Picnic Tableware.Reliable,Stackable,Reuseable and Light Plastic Bowls.
features: ☑ PREMIUM QUALITY: Ximogo 100% food grade materials and BPA free plastic ensure your white plastic Soup bowl is durable. You can mix and match as you like, and enjoying food can become an art. Enjoy your party with plastic bowls.

☑ PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: These premium quality hard plastic dessert cups can suit your Birthday, party, Thanks giving, Christmas party, banquet dinner, reunion, engagement party, weddings, holiday, and all other occasions.

☑ WASHABLE & REUSABLE: These Pack of 100 durable 12oz plastic bowls, perfect for serving hot&cold meals and reducing waste. Our serving bowls for parties can be Re used more than once if washed with some warm water and soap, to give you even more value out of each unit.

☑ STRONG & DURABLE: Ximogo party bowls are sturdy, durable, and can be used as a fruit, cereal, soup, and rice bowls. These plastic party bowls work great for holding cold and hot items without getting too hot.

☑ 100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Ximogo goal is your satisfaction and to produce high quality party bowls for their customers. If for any reason you do not like our Reusable White plastic Bowls, do not hesitate to message us and we will refund your money or replace the product.
description: Product Description Product Description Make every meal effortless with our BPA-Free 12 Oz Reusable Plastic Bowls , available in a value pack of 100 . Designed for convenience, these lightweight yet sturdy bowls are perfect for serving cereals, snacks, soups, salads, desserts, and more. Crafted from high-quality plastic, they are durable and reusable, making them a practical choice for everyday use. These bowls are BPA-free and food-safe , ensuring a healthy dining experience for you and your family. They are also microwave and dishwasher safe , allowing for easy heating and cleaning. Perfect for family meals, parties, picnics, BBQs, catering events, food trucks, office lunches, outdoor gatherings, and travel , this bulk pack offers a hassle-free solution for all your serving needs. Experience convenience and reliability with XIMGO ESSENTIALS Reusable Plastic Bowls—designed for every occasion!
